openHouses.description: Ideally located in one of Irvington's most sought-after neighborhoods, this home is just minutes from schools, village shops, restaurants, parks, and recreational amenities. Enjoy easy access to the Irvington Woods and a short drive to the Irvington Metro-North station, offering a convenient commute along the Hudson River to Grand Central Terminal.
Stop by and tour this impeccably maintained 4bdrm/3.5bth home , sited on private expansive property .
